pages.title: Get started with the API
pages.description: Learn when to call the General Translation API directly, how authentication works, and how to use the OpenAPI spec.

pages.title: Upload source files
pages.description: Upload one or more source files to a Project before queuing translation. API reference for Upload source files.

pages.title: Upload translations
pages.description: Upload translated files that match previously uploaded source files. API reference for Upload translations.

pages.title: Submit file diffs
pages.description: Submit diffs for changed source or translated content instead of uploading full files. API reference for Submit file diffs.

pages.title: Download files
pages.description: Download multiple translated files in one request. API reference for Download files.

pages.title: Download file
pages.description: Download a single translated file for a Project, locale, or version. API reference for Download file.

pages.title: Publish files
pages.description: Mark translated files as published so they are ready for delivery. API reference for Publish files.

pages.title: Get file information
pages.description: Inspect source file metadata, versions, locales, and translation state. API reference for Get file information.

pages.title: Get translation status
pages.description: Check translation progress and availability by file and locale. API reference for Get translation status.

pages.title: Move files
pages.description: Move or rename files in a Project. API reference for Move files.

pages.title: Get orphaned files
pages.description: Find translated files that are no longer connected to current source files. API reference for Get orphaned files.

pages.title: Generate translation context
pages.description: Generate Project glossary terms and translation instructions from source files. API reference for Generate translation context.

pages.title: Check context freshness
pages.description: Check whether Project context is missing, stale, or ready to refresh. API reference for Check context freshness.

pages.title: Get context generation status
pages.description: Track the status of a context generation job. API reference for Get context generation status.

pages.title: Translate content at runtime
pages.description: Translate strings or structured content directly from an application or service. API reference for Translate content at runtime.

pages.title: Queue translations
pages.description: Queue uploaded source files for background translation. API reference for Queue translations.

pages.title: Get translation job status
pages.description: Retrieve status for a queued translation job. API reference for Get translation job status.

pages.title: Get branch information
pages.description: Inspect branch metadata and Project branch state. API reference for Get branch information.

pages.title: Create a branch
pages.description: Create a branch, or rename and confirm the default branch. API reference for Create a branch.

pages.title: Create or update tag
pages.description: Create or update a tag on file versions for release tracking. API reference for Create or update tag.

pages.title: Get Project information
pages.description: Read Project metadata, settings, and configuration details. API reference for Get Project information.

pages.title: Update Project information
pages.description: Update Project-level settings from automation. API reference for Update Project information.
